title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

1. Periode event: 14 - 28 Maret 2026
2. Pastikan kamu telah melakukan Multi Bind atau Login lain ke akun sosial 3. media kamu lainnya

title: 東京スカパラダイスオーケストラ VS. 稲葉浩志 - Action / THE FIRST TAKE
tags: the first take|firsttake|ファーストテイク|ふぁーすとていく|一発撮り|TFT|音楽|東京スカパラダイスオーケストラ|スカパラ|すかぱら|TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA|稲葉浩志|いなばこうし|Koshi Inaba|B'z|ビーズ|びーず|Action|アクション|あくしょん
description:
「THE FIRST TAKE」は、一発撮りのパフォーマンスを鮮明に切り取るYouTubeチャンネル。

第646回は、日本を代表する9人組スカバンド・東京スカパラダイスオーケストラが、ゲストアーティストにB'z稲葉浩志を迎えて「THE FIRST TAKE」に初登場。
今回披露するのは、”戦うように一緒に音楽を作っていく”というコンセプトのもと、楽曲制作から共同で作り上げていくという音楽プロジェクト「VS.シリーズ」の１曲であり、稲葉浩志とのコラボレーションが話題となった「Action」。
「人生を気楽に、だけど戦うように楽しんでほしい」という想いが込められており、東京スカパラダイスオーケストラが持つパワフルなスカサウンドと、稲葉浩志の圧倒的な歌唱力と表現力が融合した本楽曲を、「THE FIRST TAKE」だけの情熱ほとばしるスペシャルパフォーマンスで一発撮り。

STREAMING & DOWNLOAD: https://tokyoska.lnk.to/Action

■RULES
白いスタジオに置かれた一本のマイク。
ここでのルールはただ一つ。
一発撮りのパフォーマンスをすること。

A microphone and a white studio.
And 1 rule.
You’ve got 1 TAKE.

■STATEMENT
一発撮りで切りとる。
今という時間と、
今しか出せない音を。

THE FIRST TAKE
この瞬間は、二度とない。

CAPTURE THE TAKE.
THIS MOMENT.
THIS SOUND.

THE FIRST TAKE
IT ONLY HAPPENS ONCE.

Episode 646 features the first appearance of one of Japan’s leading ska bands, TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA, along with guest artist Koshi Inaba from B’z on THE FIRST TAKE.
They will perform “Action,” a song that has attracted considerable attention as a collaboration with Koshi Inaba. The song is part of the VS. Series—a musical project by TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA,  based on the concept of “creating music together as if in battle,” with collaboration beginning at the production stage.
Enjoy this special one-shot performance, burning with passion as TOKYO SKA PARADISE ORCHESTRA’s powerful ska sound fuses with Koshi Inaba’s masterful and expressive vocals, carrying the message to “enjoy life and take it easy, but with the intensity of a battle,” exclusively on THE FIRST TAKE.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

ただそばにいさせてよ


ずっと私ばかりだって思ってたけど
知っちゃったの長く会えなかった時に
こっそり占い師に相談したこと

君ってほんと顔に出づらいのに
基本受け身で全然分からないの
そこんとこどうなの？

君の特別は増えてくばっかね
私のことより好きにならないでおいてね
なんかさびしいじゃない

私のいる世界の住人は
君が大半を占めてるけどさ
そっちの方はどうなんだい？
引っ越してしまいたい！

2人なら世界も変えられる
なんてバカなセリフも真面目にうたうよ
だって本当は君のほうも
そう思ってることだってなくもなくもないだろう


八方美人の君も良いんだけど
私の前でだけ性格が悪くなる
君が好き

君の見る世界は特別で
私には到底理解できないけど
半分だけ教えてくれ
分かち合いたいんだよ

あ、そうだ！そんなことより
いつものカラオケ行こうよ
終わる頃には
全部忘れて
笑っているよ

*******

〈ふみのプロフィール〉
BMSG×ちゃんみなが手がけたガールズグループオーディション「No No Girls」 に参加し、
約7,000人の応募者の中から最終選考まで進出したファイナリスト10名の一人。
静謐な弾き語りから躍動感あふれるバンドサウンドまで、自由自在にその世界観を展開する。
2026年1月11日、活動名を「ふみの」とし、
ちゃんみなが主宰する新たなセルフプロデュース型レーベル 「NO LABEL ARTISTS」 の第一弾アーティストとしてデビュー。
デビュー曲「favorite song」は“JAPAN Hot 100” 9位を記録し、MVは公開20時間で100万回再生を突破するなど話題に。
そんなふみのが送り出す、3月13日リリースの2ndシングル「ホットライン」は、自身の作詞・作曲による楽曲。
ちゃんみなから プレゼントされた「favorite song」でデビューし、今作は、ふみのがシンガーソングライターとして活動していく、記念すべき楽曲となる。

ファン同士の交流や、視聴者参加型企画の募集を行っています
https://discord.gg/yNUS9W6a8K

▼ドズル社×LEVEL∞ コラボPC
https://www.pc-koubou.jp/pc/game_dozle.php

▼みんなへ

ども！ドズルです！

概要欄からこんにちは！
こんなところまでチェックしてくれて、ありがとうございます。

ドズル社のことをもっと知りたい！！！って概要欄をひらいてくれたのかな？
そんなあなたに、伝えたいメッセージを書きます！

ドズル社はみんなの「人生というゲームをもっと楽しく」することを目的に活動しています。
僕たちのコンテンツを通じて、たくさん笑顔になってくれると嬉しいです。
みんなのゲームに登場する愉快なキャラクターになれていますか？


応援の方法もたくさんあります。
動画を見る、コメントする、グッズを買う、イベントに参加する、
ドズル社を話題にする、おすすめする、イラストを描く、切り抜きをする。

そのすべてが僕たちのパワーになって、みんなのおかげで楽しく活動できています！
本当にいつもありがとう！！！


ただ、一つだけ約束してください。
応援しすぎて、疲れないように！！！
みんなに楽しんでもらうために活動しているので、応援しすぎて疲れちゃうのは本末転倒です。

自分のペースで、ゆるーくながーく応援してくださいね。
それが一番うれしいです。

今日、動画を見てくれた人が、
明日も、来週も、来年も、10年後も見たくなるような動画を作りつづけたい！

全部の動画を見なくてもいいです。
たまに動画を見てくれるだけでも、本当に嬉しいです。
好きな時に、ふらっと動画を見にきてください。

将来どんなことができるか、ワクワクです。
一緒にドズル社の変化を楽しみながら、人生というゲームを楽しみましょう！

この曲は2007年にリリースされ、それから19年の月日が経ちました。（2026年2月時点）
この曲と共にたくさんの素敵な思い出を作っていただき、
そしてこの曲を育て、愛していただきありがとうございます。

震災の時に、暗闇の中で歌ってくれた子たち。
卒業式で、涙を流しながら歌ってくれた子たち。
そして別れの場面で、仲間たちと歌ってくれた皆さん。

たくさんの方の人生の節目に、この楽曲が寄り添うことができたことを本当に嬉しく思います。

これから先も、いつの時代も、この「道」が皆さんそれぞれの人生の“道”に寄り添う楽曲であり続けますように。

========= Historic Fact ==========

The Japanese battleship Yamato was the pride of the Imperial Japanese Navy, conceived in secrecy and commissioned in 1941 as the most powerful battleship ever built. Displacing over 70,000 tons at full load and armed with nine unprecedented 18.1-inch (46 cm) main guns, Yamato embodied Japan’s belief in decisive naval combat.
As naval warfare rapidly evolved with the rise of carrier aviation, Yamato was often employed as a fleet flagship, serving as a commanding presence and a symbol of resolve rather than engaging constantly in battle. Her final mission in April 1945, Operation Ten-Go, reflected the courage and sense of duty embodied by her crew. Sent to defend Okinawa against overwhelming odds, Yamato fought on despite relentless attacks from American carrier aircraft. After sustaining numerous bomb and torpedo hits, she sank in a massive explosion.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

スターダストプロモーション所属の5人組の男性グループ。
ボーカルTETTA（1997年11月24日生まれ）、REI（1997年1月2日生まれ）、EIKU（1999年12月19日生まれ）。ラップ&ダンサーHAYATO（1999年9月17日生まれ）、NAOYA（1998年4月6日生まれ）からなる5人組。2023年の南米ワンマンツアーを経て、Latin(ラテン)カルチャーを取り込み"J-Pop"と"Latin Music"を融合した、さらなる独自のスタイル"Jatin Pop(ジャティンポップ)"へと進化し、唯一無二のスタイルを貫き続けるダンス&ボーカルグループ。

Music Videoは世界各国注目され、南米・アジア圏・欧州からのアクセスが殺到し、合計再生回数は3000万回を突破！TikTokフォロワー数は、日本人男性音楽アーティストでは1位となる580万人超え! 動画の総再生回数は6.2億回を突破!!
2022年7月にはブラジルで開催された南米最大のアニメフェス『Anime Friends 2022』で初の海外パフォーマンスを成功させ、2023年4月にはワンマンでのラテンアメリカツアー「LATIN TOUR 2023」を開催した。
2023年10月より47都道府県ツアー『ONE N’ SWAG ～Hook Up!!!!!!～』を開催。ツアーファイナルとなるパシフィコ横浜公演を含む全47公演がソールドアウトした。

2025年、ユニバーサルミュージック/ Polydor Recordsと全世界契約し、メジャーデビューすることを発表。2025年4月より、グループが目標としていた日本武道館公演を含む『LIVE TOUR 2025 ||:ONE N' ONLY:||』を開催。

ONE N’ ONLY is a five-piece boy band comprised of TETTA, REI, EIKU, HAYATO, and NAOYA. Formed by renown Japanese talent agency Stardust Promotion, the members were originally from two separate bands, EBiSSH and SBC (Satori Boys Club).

Since their debut in 2018, they’ve boasted their unique ability to blend genres, starting with J-POP. They have since evolved to Jatin Pop, a blend of Japanese and Latin pop, after finding international TikTok success.

The band’s music videos have garnered views from Asia, Latin and North America, and Europe, with a total view count exceeding 30 million. They are Japan’s Number 1 most followed male musical artist on TikTok with over 5.8 million followers and 620 million views.

In 2022, the band performed overseas for the first time at South America’s largest Anime event, Anime Friends 2022. In the following year, they embarked on their headlining LATIN TOUR 2023. Later in 2023, the band toured across all 47 of Japan’s prefectures, closing their tour with a sold-out show at Pacifico Yokohama. 

In 2025, ONE N’ ONLY signed a worldwide contract with Universal Music/Polydor Records, simultaneously announcing their major label debut. Starting in April, the group kicked off their “LIVE TOUR 2025 ||:ONE N' ONLY:||” which includes shows at the historic Nippon Budokan.

3月11日、アウトランズにガンダムがやってくる。
伝説的なユニバース2つが衝突し、象徴的な武器、ガンダムにインスピレーションを受けた装飾アイテム、新生ブロークンムーンが登場します。

title: 鈴木雅之 feat. 渋谷凪咲「渋谷で5時 (2026 Ver.)」Music Video
channel_title: 鈴木雅之 Official YouTube Channel
tags: 鈴木雅之|シャネルズ|ラッツ&スター|渋谷凪咲|NMB|渋谷|渋谷区|東横線|ハチ公|犬|秋田犬|Shibuya|Tokyo|Japan|スクランブル交差点|デュエット|ラブソング|カラオケ|ドラマ|日テレ|日本テレビ|ライブ|コンサート|大瀧詠一|ナイアガラ|め組|ランナウェイ|かぐや様|鈴木愛理|DADDY! DADDY!DO!|主題歌|アニソン|水野良樹|本間昭光|kaguyasama|anime|アニソン界の大型新人|名曲|再発見|レコーディング|ジェシー|SixTONES|藤木直人
description:
鈴木雅之 feat. 渋谷凪咲「渋谷で5時(2026 Ver.)」
DL & Streaming: https://masayukisuzuki.lnk.to/Shibuyade5ji_2026
作詞：朝水彼方　作曲：鈴木雅之　編曲：亀田誠治

1993年にリリースされた平成を代表するデュエット曲「渋谷で5時」を、デュエットパートナーとしてタレントで女優の渋谷凪咲、サウンドプロデューサーに亀田誠治を迎え、33年の時を経て再録音。「渋谷で5時 (2026 Ver.) feat. 渋谷凪咲」として令和版にアップデート。
今作での渋谷凪咲の起用の理由は、きっかけは『”渋谷”と“渋谷で５時”をやりたい』というダジャレがきっかけだが、『「渋谷で5時」という曲は、キュートな歌声に加えセリフもとても重要』という鈴木のこだわりの中で、日頃から女優としても活躍している渋谷にオファー。対する渋谷もアイドル時代のキャッチフレーズに"渋谷で待ち合わせ"という言葉が入っていたという偶然も重なり、今回のデュエットが成立。曲のイントロ・アウトロ部分には大阪出身の渋谷凪咲ならではの関西弁でのセリフがフィーチャーされるなど、彼女の個性も際立った“令和版・渋谷で5時”となった。

本MVは、渋谷区、各電鉄会社の全面協力の下、渋谷の街の各所でのロケを敢行。実際に渋谷駅前スクランブル交差点を二人で歩く姿や、歌唱シーンを東急東横線の渋谷駅構内で撮影、リムジン内から渋谷の街並みを撮影するなど、2026年現在のリアルな渋谷の街とともに、鈴木雅之と渋谷凪咲の姿が写し出されている。
さらに、渋谷の街の象徴であるハチ公をイメージして実際の秋田犬も登場するという、鈴木雅之らしいユーモアも忘れていない点にも注目だ。

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

De Frente y Sin Miedo (Remix) – Video Oficial

“De Frente y Sin Miedo” cuenta la historia de alguien que fue golpeado por la vida, traicionado, señalado y puesto a prueba, pero que jamás bajó la cabeza.

Es un mensaje claro:
cuando caminas con fe, disciplina y verdad, no hay obstáculo que te detenga.

Este video representa lucha, carácter y determinación.
No se trata de aparentar, se trata de resistir, levantarse y seguir firme, aunque el camino sea duro.

🙏 Para los que creen en Dios
💪 Para los que avanzan sin miedo

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

Starring breakout stars Fyang Smith and JM Ibarra in their first solo movie, Almost Us asks:

Why do we sometimes reach for the distant when the one who loves us most is right here?

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: MUÔN VỊ NHÂN SINH | PHAN MẠNH QUỲNH | OFFICIAL MV
tags: phan mạnh quỳnh|phan manh quynh|ca sĩ phan mạnh quỳnh|phan mạnh quỳnh huỳnh khánh vy|phan mạnh quỳnh kiên ứng|antiantiart|muôn vị nhân sinh|ai cũng xứng đáng có nơi gọi là nhà|nhạc phim phan mạnh quỳnh|phan mạnh quỳnh live|tuyển tập nhạc phan mạnh quỳnh|phan mạnh quỳnh mv|muôn vị nhân sinh mv|mv muôn vị nhân sinh|mv muon vi nhan sinh|muon vi nhan sinh|muon vi nhan sinh mv
description:
Một hành trình nghệ thuật nơi triết lý “vị nhân sinh” của Văn Phú gặp gỡ những giai điệu giàu chiêm nghiệm từ Phan Mạnh Quỳnh. Muôn Vị Nhân Sinh không chỉ kể một câu chuyện bằng âm nhạc mà còn đồng hành cùng những nỗ lực thầm lặng và những thử thách mỗi người phải kiên định bước qua trong cuộc sống. Trên hành trình trưởng thành ấy, điều ý nghĩa nhất không nằm ở việc trở thành một ai khác, mà ở sự bền bỉ để mỗi ngày tiến về phía trước và trở thành phiên bản tốt hơn của chính mình so với ngày hôm qua.

Lyrics:

Ver 1:

Đèn vừa lên khu phố nối theo cảnh hoàng hôn, 
Người đã có niềm vui quây quần, 
Người loay hoay còn trong ca muộn, 
Chuyên Tâm thật miệt mài. 

Và nhìn qua ô kính thấy muôn câu chuyện giống nhau: 
Khó khăn sống những ngày ban đầu 
Vì người mà cố gắng phút giây.

Pre-chorus: 
  Giữa nơi phố quen, lắm huyên náo 
Nên đôi lần mơ một nơi chốn mình thuộc về, 
Để được lắng nghe chính ta, 
Gắn bó thiết tha 
Và hằng ngày nghe tâm hồn mình mở ra. 

Điệp khúc:
Ai cũng xứng đáng có nơi gọi là nhà,
Để được sống hơn chính mình ngày hôm qua. 
Bởi dù bao đêm lặng lẽ, ánh sáng nhỏ bé,  
Bạn đã không quay lưng với giấc mơ này.

Từ nơi đây xin quan tâm mình nữa nhé, 
Hãy nhiệt huyết cũng hãy vui khi nghỉ ngơi. 
Món quà vô giá: bình yên,  hạnh phúc gọi tên. 
Mỗi ngày để yêu thương được lớn thêm.


Ver 2:
Hằng ngày được ở trong chính tổ ấm, 
Bạn mỉm cười vì hằng biết ơn lao động. 
Hiện tại và cả phía trước 
Những kỷ niệm thật đẹp!

Dù từng ngày, đôi chân ta đi qua muôn vị nhân sinh
Thì dịu êm khi mở cánh cửa nhà mình. 
Nhớ lại từ gian nan ta bước đến, 
Thở phào rồi phiền lo dần nhẹ tênh. 

Pre-chorus:
Giữa nơi phố quen, lắm huyên náo 
Nhưng nay tìm thấy một nơi chốn mình thuộc về, 
Để được lắng nghe chính ta, 
Gắn bó thiết tha 
Và hằng ngày nghe tâm hồn mình mở ra.

description:
মা গো তোমার সাথে কত ঝগড়া | Moyaj Ali | Nasheed Film

মা গো তোমার সাথে কত ঝগড়া ইসলামিক গজলটি আমাদের সেরা সৃষ্টিগুলোর একটি। মোয়াজ আলী এর সুমধুর কন্ঠে এই গানটি শুনুন ও ভালোলাগার মধ্যে হারিয়ে যান। 

গানটির লিরিক্স ও সুর এমনভাবে তৈরি করা হয়েছে যা আপনার হৃদয় ছুঁয়ে যাবে। নাশিদ ফিল্ম এর গুণগত মানসম্পন্ন ভিডিও নির্মাণ ও সাউন্ড ডিজাইন আপনার পছন্দের তালিকাতে জায়গা করে নিবে।

আপনি যদি আপনার আশেপাশে প্রতিভাবান ইসলামিক সংগীতশিল্পী বাচ্চাদের চেনেন, তাহলে আমাদের সাথে যোগাযোগ করুন। আমরা তাদের প্রতিভা তুলে ধরতে সহযোগিতা করতে চাই।

আমাদের আরও বেশ কিছু জনপ্রিয় গজল শুনতে লিঙ্কটি চেক করুন। নতুন গজল পেতে চ্যানেলটি সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন ও ভিডিওটি শেয়ার করতে ভুলবেন না।

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

21 Ramzan Noha 2026 dedicated to the martyrdom of Maula Ali (AS), the great leader of Ahlul Bayt. This recitation remembers the tragic event in Masjid-e-Kufa when Hazrat Ali ibn Abi Talib was struck by Ibn-e-Muljim during Fajr prayer. The sorrowful day of 21 Ramadan marks the departure of the Commander of the Faithful whose life was a symbol of justice, courage and devotion to Islam.
This spiritual kalam recalls the sacrifice of the first Imam and the grief felt by believers around the world. The remembrance of Shahadat-e-Ali is observed every year in the holy month of Ramazan as lovers of Ameer-ul-Momineen gather to pay tribute to the legacy of the Lion of Allah. His teachings of truth, patience and humanity continue to guide the Ummah.
This latest Ramazan 2026 release honors the memory of the noble personality who was wounded in Kufa and later left this world on the 21st of the blessed month. The tragedy connected with Ibn Muljim remains one of the most emotional moments in Islamic history, remembered through recitations, elegies and gatherings dedicated to the virtues of Imam-e-Adil.

May Maula Keeps All Azadars Safe in Azadari Specially Juloos Youm E Ali, Majlis in the current situation of karachi / Pakistan.

title: Sohna Nabi PBUH | Ali Zafar | Naat
tags: mera sohna nabi|mera sohna nabi ali zafar|mera sohna nabi pbuh|ali zafar naat|ali zafar mera sohna nabi|mera sohna nabi naat|mera sohna nabi full naat|mera sohna nabi lyrics|mera sohna nabi status|ali zafar naat 2026|naat sharif|islamic naat|beautiful naat|heart touching naat|emotional naat|best naat sharif|islamic video|urdu naat sharif|pakistan naat|ramzan naat|ramadan naat|islamic naat video|trending naat|viral naat|ali zafar islamic naat
description:
Sohna Nabi is not just a naat. It is an expression of love and remembrance.
We live in a time when the world feels louder, harsher, and more divided than ever before. In such moments, hearts instinctively search for something pure, something constant, something that reminds us of who we are meant to be. The life of the Beloved Prophet Muhammad ﷺ remains one of the most powerful reminders of that truth.

His message was not only spiritual, it was deeply human. In a world fractured by ego, power, and division, he taught mercy over anger, compassion over cruelty, humility over pride. The guidance he brought into the world offers a timeless roadmap for how human beings can coexist with dignity, justice, and compassion in their hearts for one another.
Centuries have passed, yet the light of that example continues to reach hearts across languages, cultures, and generations. It reminds us that the path to peace in the world begins with peace within ourselves.

Sohna Nabi is simply a reflection of that love, that reverence, and that longing that lives quietly in the hearts of millions.

Peace and blessings be upon the Beloved Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, always.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: DIA D: O Segredo de 79 Anos Revelado no Novo Trailer! | Disclosure Day
tags: cultura pop|nostalgia|anos 80|anos 90|retro|filmes|séries|cinema|curiosidades|arquivo j|cultura pop nostalgia|clássico|arquivo jota|anos 2000|streaming
description:
DIA D: O segredo de Roswell e o mistério do Ocupante H5 revelados no trailer 2 de Disclosure Day de Steven Spielberg. Descubra a análise completa do personagem Daniel Kellner em uma trama de ficção científica e ufologia real. Tudo sobre a conexão 1947 e 2026 que o novo trailer de DIA-D escondeu de você até agora!

Saudações Jotistas! O novo trailer de DIA-D chegou e ele não é apenas um filme: é a revelação de um mistério guardado há 79 anos! Neste vídeo, fazemos uma análise completa frame a frame, revelando:Daniel Kellner: O analista de segurança que descobriu segredos que não pertencem a humanos. Conexão Roswell: A prova real de que o filme se passa em 2026 e revisita o incidente de 1947. Ocupante H6: O que significa o código militar escondido na tela de vigilância? tags: nada me separa|brasas|somos brasas 2|somos brasas|nada me separa felipe rodrigues|nada me separa marcelo markes|nada me separa adoração|felipe rodrigues|marcelo markes|nada me separa do teu amor|como escudo|como espada|trago em meu corpo as suas marcas|como um selo em minha alma|abdiel arsenio|carol braga|ancorado estou em cristo|nada me separa ao vivo|nada me separa brasas|nada me separa do teu amor felipe rodrigues|nada me separa felipe|adoração
description:
Inscreva-se em nosso canal: @BrasasMusic 

A canção inédita “Nada Me Separa”, do projeto Somos Brasas 2, é uma declaração de fé e perseverança. Inspirada na certeza do amor de Cristo, a música afirma que nenhuma prisão, perseguição ou circunstância é capaz de afastar quem está ancorado n’Ele. Com linguagem bíblica e intensa, a canção destaca a Palavra como escudo e marca viva na alma. 

Gravado Ao Vivo na Igreja Nova Aliança em Londrina, PR.

--
Não há ninguém, nunca haverá
Alguém que a ti se compare
E que possa se comparar

Não há prisões
Nem perseguições
Alguém que de Ti me afaste
Ou que possa me afastar

Guardo em meu peito
Tua palavra
Como escudo, como espada
Trago em meu corpo
As suas marcas
Como um selo em minha alma

Nada me separa
Nada me separa
Do Teu amor
Pois ancorado estou em Cristo

Guardo em meu peito
Tua palavra
Como escudo, como espada
Trago em meu corpo
As suas marcas
Como um selo em minha alma

--

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025’s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry’s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

Darktide's new, free update Beyond the Hive, will see you traversing the vast, uncharted wilderness of Atoma Prime. The update releases March 17.

Beyond the Hive brings a wealth of new content to Darktide:

- New game mode Expeditions: Venture beyond the confines of Hive Tertium and find out what horrors await you outside its walls.
- New enemies: Ogryn Pack Master & Armoured Pox Hounds
- More firepower: Decimate packs of heretics with the Modified Grenade or call an artillery strike to obliterate a whole horde or try one of the other alternatives.
Environmental threats: The environment is as toxic and deadly as the chaos that infects it. With twisters, lightning storms and a polluted atmosphere.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

========= Historic Fact ==========

The Japanese battleship Yamato was the pride of the Imperial Japanese Navy, conceived in secrecy and commissioned in 1941 as the most powerful battleship ever built. Displacing over 70,000 tons at full load and armed with nine unprecedented 18.1-inch (46 cm) main guns, Yamato embodied Japan’s belief in decisive naval combat.
As naval warfare rapidly evolved with the rise of carrier aviation, Yamato was often employed as a fleet flagship, serving as a commanding presence and a symbol of resolve rather than engaging constantly in battle. Her final mission in April 1945, Operation Ten-Go, reflected the courage and sense of duty embodied by her crew. Sent to defend Okinawa against overwhelming odds, Yamato fought on despite relentless attacks from American carrier aircraft. After sustaining numerous bomb and torpedo hits, she sank in a massive explosion.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025’s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry’s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

description:
Wishlist & sign up for the Closed Alpha: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2605790/Deep_Rock_Galactic_Rogue_Core/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=description&utm_campaign=ea_release_date_trailer

DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a 1-4 player co-op FPS action roguelike featuring sci-fi dwarves, alien horrors and procedurally-generated caves. Join the elite dwarven Reclaimers and fight through perilous mining facilities infested with deadly Core Spawn. For Rock and Stone!

Think you’ve got what it takes to brave the depths?

Developed by Ghost Ship Games
Published by Ghost Ship Publishing

About the game
--------------------
DEEP ROCK GALACTIC: ROGUE CORE is a spinoff of Deep Rock Galactic with a roguelite twist.  

The roguelite twist means you start from basics in each mission and cooperatively build up powers and abilities for the team, sometimes leading to insanely overpowered builds and other times to spectacular fails

Expenite - a new mineral of incredible value and use has been discovered on planet Hoxxes! Space mining company Deep Rock Galactic immediately sets up covert mining operations deeper than ever, to harvest this precious material. Suddenly and without warning - all the dig sites go dark, and all contact is abruptly lost.

In this action-packed 1-4 player co-op roguelite, take on the role of a team of elite dwarven Reclaimers called to planet Hoxxes IV to deal with the situation. Bring the lost dig sites back online, unravel the mystery of The Greyout, and keep it from happening again using all the guts, guns, and grit at your disposal.

The Core has gone Rogue. DRG needs your help! 
--------------------

title: Mario Odyssey but the world is "Tile-Locked"
description:
You can play War Thunder now using my links to sign up! You’ll get a massive free bonus pack with vehicles, boosters and more on PC and consoles: https://playwt.link/fir26  | Mobile: https://wtm.game/fir

Today we are doing a challenge that was inspired by @Settledrs'd Tileman series (However the idea originates from @sram1337 to my knowledge). Super Mario Odyssey has been broken up into a series of tiles that I can only access by collecting moons, coins and purples. This turns the game into a massive puzzle where i Have to make sure I purchase the right tiles to not softlock the kingdom. Tiles are not saved between kingdoms and dying at any point resets the level. 

It was a miracle we were able to put this video together as it really pushes the limits of Mario Odyssey, so I hope you enjoy!

Reclaim power. Reach beyond. The fight for Pywel begins on March 19, 2026 (GMT/PT) on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, Steam, Mac and Epic Games Store.

Pre-load on PlayStation Store, Xbox Store, Microsoft Store, and Steam starts March 17 at 22:00 GMT / 15:00 PT.

Join Kliff the Greymane as he embarks across the continent of Pywel to rebuild what has been lost and to save the land from a looming threat. Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game developed by Pearl Abyss. A devastating ambush in the deep of night by their sworn enemies the Black Bears leaves members of the Greymanes dead or scattered across the continent. The Greymane Kliff is determined to reunite with his surviving comrades and rebuild what was lost. But on a journey where alliances are forged, dangers abound, and mysterious factions are uncovered, Kliff comes to realize that an unprecedented threat and a destiny greater than he imagined await him.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:
Director: Hur Sungwhe
Art Director: Léa Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo

========= Historic Fact ==========

The Japanese battleship Yamato was the pride of the Imperial Japanese Navy, conceived in secrecy and commissioned in 1941 as the most powerful battleship ever built. Displacing over 70,000 tons at full load and armed with nine unprecedented 18.1-inch (46 cm) main guns, Yamato embodied Japan’s belief in decisive naval combat.
As naval warfare rapidly evolved with the rise of carrier aviation, Yamato was often employed as a fleet flagship, serving as a commanding presence and a symbol of resolve rather than engaging constantly in battle. Her final mission in April 1945, Operation Ten-Go, reflected the courage and sense of duty embodied by her crew. Sent to defend Okinawa against overwhelming odds, Yamato fought on despite relentless attacks from American carrier aircraft. After sustaining numerous bomb and torpedo hits, she sank in a massive explosion.

description:
Offizieller "Ein Münchner im Himmel" Trailer Deutsch German 2026 | Abonnieren ➤ https://abo.yt/kc | (OT: Ein Münchner im Himmel) Hannah Herzsprung, Heiner Lauterbach, Olli Schulz Movie Trailer | Kino: 14 Mai 2026 | Filminfos https://KinoCheck.de/film/2pj/ein-muenchner-im-himmel-2026?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=description
Taxifahrer und Münchner Original Wiggerl (Maximilian Brückner) landet nach einem Autounfall im Himmel – aber statt Bier und Blasmusik gibt’s hier nur Soja-Manna und Yoga zu Harfenklängen. Ein Albtraum für den aufmüpfigen bairischen Dickkopf.
Damit im Himmel wieder Ruhe und Frieden einkehrt, schickt man ihn kurzerhand mit einer Mission zurück. Wenn er es schafft sein Karma-Konto auf Vordermann zu bringen, darf er auf der Erde bleiben. Allerdings ist Wiggerls Tochter Toni (Momo Beier) die Einzige, die ihn jetzt noch sehen und hören kann. Für alle anderen ist er Luft. Seine Bitte, ihm zu helfen, schmettert Toni ab – schließlich hat sich ihr Vater zu Lebzeiten kaum um sie und ihre Mutter (Hannah Herzsprung) gekümmert. Nur mit einer ordentlichen Portion Selbsterkenntnis gelingt es Wiggerl schließlich wieder etwas Vertrauen zurückzugewinnen. Aber der Wettlauf gegen die Zeit ist noch nicht vorbei und Wiggerl dämmert so langsam, worum es bei seiner Mission eigentlich geht…

Ich habe keine Angst

Ich halt mich selbst im Labyrinth gefangen
Such verzweifelt nach nem Loch durch das ich fliehen kann
Will nur weit weit weit weit weg
Will nur raus aus meinem Versteck 
Doch ich lass nicht zu, dass mich der Schmerz erdrückt
Weil es mein Gegengift dafür längst gibt
Ganz egal wie tief ich fall
Ich bin nicht mehr allein
Ich hör die Musik
Und habe keine Angst
Ganz egal ob mein Herz weint
auf Tränenwellen treibt
Ich hör die Musik
Und habe keine Angst
Ich habe keine Angst
Ich kann so oft nicht mal mich selbst verstehen
Keine Fußspuren im Sand an meiner Seite sehen
 
Doch da gibt gibt gibt es dich
Wisch meine Tränen vom Gesicht
 
Um im grauen Nebel helles Licht zu sehen
brauch ich nur den Klang aus unseren Kehlen

Auch wenn der Sturm mich jagt     
das letzte Licht erlischt
Ich habe keine Angst - keine Angst
Wenn mich der Zweifel frisst
und mir die Hoffnung fehlt 
Ich habe keine Angst - keine Angst

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: BAGARRE – Bande-annonce – Nassim Lyes (2026)
description:
Un film de Julien Royal avec Nassim Lyes, Anaïde Rozam, Ramzy Bedia, Hedi Bouchenafa, Arriles Amrani, Matthieu Longatte, Mathias Quivigier, Marina Foïs, Hatik, Audrey Lamy, Hakim Jemili, Ramal, Lamine Ba, Yvan Naubron, Ichem Bougheraba, Eliott Doyle, Paul Deby, Idir Azougli, Manon Azem, Eva Huault, Greg yega, Elams et Farah Nitshaa. Le 15 avril 2026 au cinéma.

Naim est un amour dans la vie et un monstre quand il s’agit de se battre. Pour soigner sa chienne malade il est contraint d’intégrer « Allo Bagarre » un service de combattants de rue qui règlent les embrouilles à coups de poings. Mais le jour où il comprendra que les conflits se règlent par le dialogue, Naim aura bien du mal à se faire entendre.

Date de sortie : le 15 avril 2026 au cinéma.

description:
Reclaim power. Reach beyond. The fight for Pywel begins on March 19, 2026 (GMT/PT) on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Xbox on PC, Steam, Mac and Epic Games Store.

Pre-load on PlayStation Store, Xbox Store, Microsoft Store, and Steam starts March 17 at 22:00 GMT / 15:00 PT.

Join Kliff the Greymane as he embarks across the continent of Pywel to rebuild what has been lost and to save the land from a looming threat. From vast wilderness and cities to ancient ruins and the mystery of the Abyss, explore the lands and forge your path through battles and discovery in this open-world action-adventure.
(The footage captured in this trailer was captured on PC.)

Pre-order Crimson Desert:
» Steam: https://pearlabyss.info/lteno
» PlayStation Store: https://pearlabyss.info/ps_store
» Xbox Store: https://pearlabyss.info/xbox_store
» Epic Games Store: https://pearlabyss.info/epic_store

About Crimson Desert  
Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game developed by Pearl Abyss. A devastating ambush in the deep of night by their sworn enemies the Black Bears leaves members of the Greymanes dead or scattered across the continent. The Greymane Kliff is determined to reunite with his surviving comrades and rebuild what was lost. But on a journey where alliances are forged, dangers abound, and mysterious factions are uncovered, Kliff comes to realize that an unprecedented threat and a destiny greater than he imagined await him.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

볼리베어 세트 쉬바나 쓰레쉬 아지르 아트록스 애니 오른 제라스 직스 질리언 킨드레드 탐 켄치 피들스틱 내셔 남작 라이즈 브록 사일러스 아우렐리온 솔 자헨

[아이템]
죽음의검 죽검 거인학살자 거학 밤의 끝자락 밤끝 피바라기 마법공학 총검 쇼진의 창 스테락의 도전 무한의 대검 인피 붉은 덩굴정령 레드 거인의 결의 거결 루난의 허리케인 구인수의 격노검 스태틱의 단검
내셔의 이빨 최후의 속삭임 덤불 조끼 가갑 가고일 돌갑옷 크라운가드 수호자의 맹세 수맹 굳건한 심장 굳심 용의 발톱 이온 충격기 적응형 투구 저녁갑주 수은 라바돈의 죽음모자 라죽모 데캡 대천사의 지팡이
모렐로노미콘 보석 건틀릿 보건 푸른 파수꾼 블루 구원 정의의 손길 정손 워모그의 갑옷 방패파괴자 방파 타격대의 철퇴 도적의 장갑 도장 전략가의 왕관 강철의 솔라리 펜던트
도박꾼의 칼날 라이트실드 문장 루덴의 폭풍 리치베인 마나자네 마법사의 최후 망령 해적검 무한한 삼위일체 방한 장갑 생선대가리 선체분쇄자 속임수 거울 수상한 외투 승천의 부적 역병의 보석 영원한 겨울
영혼의 형상 은빛 여명 자객의 발톱 저격수의 집중 존야의 역설 죽음불꽃 손아귀 죽음의 저항 지평선의 초점 추적자의 팔목 보호대 타락한 흡혈의 낫 활력증진의 펜던트 황금 징수의 총
거석상의 유산 거인의 맹세 공정의 주먹 구인수의 심판 남작의 선물 눈부신 건틀릿 라바돈의 초월한 죽음모자 루난의 폭풍 마법공학 생명검 면죄 반짝이는 수은 별의 균형 빛나는 죽음의 검 새벽의 서광
수호상 돌갑옷 스태틱의 호의 스테락의 초강력 보호막 악마 학살자 엔젤로노미콘 영겁의 속삭임 왕가의 방패 용의 의지 우르프 천사의 지팡이 워모그의 자부심 의지파괴자 잉걸불 문장 장난꾸러기의 장갑
장미가시 조끼 집단 충격기 천공의 대검 철갑의 서약 축복받은 피바라기 태양빛 망토 푸른 축복 해신 작쇼 히라나의 창 크라켄의 분노 거대한 히드라 명멸검 불굴 격류의 소용돌이 충만한 정령의 형상
귀신들린 망원경 귤 더미 드레드웨이 대포 따개비 장갑 망자의 단검 불한당의 해적검 선장의 모자 선장의 비법 암시장 폭발물 약탈자의 주사위 일등 항해사의 화승총 행운의 금화 90구경 투망 가속 관문

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: Я снова здесь. Цой, Высоцкий, Горшенёв и другие легенды в одном клипе!
tags: #airushv|#airush|AI|цой|airush|нейросети|нейронки|#цойжив|горшенев|горшок|высоцкий|хой|юрий хой|тальков|летов|курт кобейн|пётр мамонов|крупнов|горшенев клипы|панк рок|михаил горшенев|#цой2025|airrush|кино|кино цой
description:
«Я снова здесь» - это музыкальная и визуальная фантазия о том, что после финала культового фильма «Игла» герой Виктора Цоя не исчезает, а переносится в параллельную реальность, где продолжают жить легенды ушедшей эпохи. Там время словно остановилось, а голоса, лица и образы тех, кто стал символами целого поколения, снова оказываются рядом - в одном пространстве, в одной истории.

В клипе внимательные зрители найдут множество отсылок к образам легендарных музыкантов, ушедших слишком рано. В видео есть образы Виктора Цоя, Владимира Высоцкого, Игоря Талькова, Егора Летова, Янки Дягилевой, Юрия Хоя, Михаила Горшенёва, Курта Кобейна, Петра Мамонова, Анатолия Крупнова, Георгия Гурьянова, Майка Науменко и Александра Башлачёва.

🎵 Песня «Я снова здесь», исполнитель AiRushV, доступна на всех музыкальных платформах.
✍️ Стихи: Максим Васильев
👤 Автор проекта: Максим Васильев - @AiRushV

⚠️ Важно:
Мы не пытаемся скопировать голос какого-либо артиста, включая Виктора Цоя. Эти голоса неповторимы. Мы делаем в похожем стиле разные эксперименты в меру своей фантазии. Рассматривайте нас как самостоятельный проект AiRushV.
Данное видео является художественным вымыслом и творческой интерпретацией.
Образы персонажей созданы с использованием технологий искусственного интеллекта и являются собирательными.
Видео создано как искренняя дань памяти и уважения кумирам и деятелям ушедшей эпохи.
Любые совпадения с реальными личностями и событиями случайны.

========= Historic Fact ==========

The Japanese battleship Yamato was the pride of the Imperial Japanese Navy, conceived in secrecy and commissioned in 1941 as the most powerful battleship ever built. Displacing over 70,000 tons at full load and armed with nine unprecedented 18.1-inch (46 cm) main guns, Yamato embodied Japan’s belief in decisive naval combat.
As naval warfare rapidly evolved with the rise of carrier aviation, Yamato was often employed as a fleet flagship, serving as a commanding presence and a symbol of resolve rather than engaging constantly in battle. Her final mission in April 1945, Operation Ten-Go, reflected the courage and sense of duty embodied by her crew. Sent to defend Okinawa against overwhelming odds, Yamato fought on despite relentless attacks from American carrier aircraft. After sustaining numerous bomb and torpedo hits, she sank in a massive explosion.

12 марта в CS2 вышло крупное обновление. Новые пушки, новые перчатки и куча новостей. Но почти никто не заметил одну странную вещь.

Ночью обновление откатили, и вместе с ним исчезло изменение на Dust2.
На миду неожиданно поменялась модель Xbox — вместо привычного ящика появилась странная конструкция из нескольких коробок.

Я решил разобраться, что это было.

В этом видео:
● почему на Dust2 менялся Xbox
● как работает коллизия этого ящика
● откуда взялся знаменитый подъём на шорт
● почему Valve уже много лет пытаются его переделать
● и что на самом деле означало это фантомное обновление

А заодно разберём всю историю самого известного ящика на Dust2 — от версии 2012 года до CS2.

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

Ummi | Annem (Live in Kayseri)

أمّي عشقٌ أهواهُ
Annem… kalbimin en derin aşkı sensin.
قمرٌ في الليلِ ضياهُ
Gecenin karanlığında parlayan bir ay gibisin.
وطني والحضنُ الدافئُ
Sen benim vatanım, sığınabildiğim en sıcak kucaksın.
عطرٌ في الكونِ نداهُ
Senin sevginin kokusu bu dünyayı dolduran en güzel kokudur.

يأخذني الشوقُ إليكِ
Sana olan özlem içimi sardığında,
فأغنّي بين يديكِ
Ellerini tutup yanında şarkılar söylerim.
الكونُ فِدا عينيكِ
Bu koca dünya senin gözlerine feda olsun annem.
أمّاهُ يا أمّاهُ
Ah annem… canım annem…

يا جنّةَ قلبي وداري
Sen kalbimin cenneti, yuvamın huzurusun.
أنتِ خيرُ الأقدارِ
Sen kaderlerin en güzeli,
هبةٌ من عند الباري
Rabbimin bana verdiği en kıymetli armağansın.
أمّاهُ يا أمّاهُ
Ah annem… canım annem…

أمّي يا نبعَ حنانٍ
Annem… merhametin bitmeyen bir pınar gibi.
مهما تَقْسُ الأيامُ
Günler ne kadar zor ve sert geçerse geçsin,
برضاكِ عنّي يا أمي
Eğer sen benden razı olursan annem,
يرضى عنّي الرحمن
Rahman da benden razı olur.

Tüm annelerin ellerinden öpüyorum.
Bir annenin duası, bu dünyadaki en büyük nimettir.
Rabbim bütün annelerimize sağlık, huzur ve uzun ömür nasip etsin.
Hayatta olan annelerimizin kıymetini bilelim, ahirete göçmüş olan annelerimize de Rabbim rahmetiyle muamele etsin.
Cennet onların ayaklarının altındadır. 🤍

title: YENİ GİZEMLER GERÇEK Mİ?! 🤫 | Brawl Stars

description:
Gizemliparator :D
Sizi seviyorum❤



Bu videoda brawl stars gizemleri gerçek mi bunu test ettim. Yeni gelen brawl talk çok iyi gözüküyor. Kenji ile sıralamaya kastım ve prestij aldım. Bedava ücretsiz ödül açtım. Kutudan ücretsiz elmas çıktı. Her öldüğümde efsanevi ödüller aldığım videolar çekmeyi seviyorum. En hızlı 50 rütbe maks kademe ve 1000 kupa kasma taktikleri veriyorum.  En kolay kupa kasma taktikleri ni verdim. Buzz ışıkyılı kupa kasma taktikleri. Aşamalı modda kolay şekilde aşama ve  lig atlama taktikleri verdiğim videolar da var. Brawl Stars a sıfırdan başladım daha önce de brawl stars sıfır hesaba kupa kasma serisi çektim ve brawl stars a yeni gelen karakter gigi oynamak istiyorum. Brawl stars ta en iyi kostümler i satın aldım . Brawl Stars kaze , kenji , gigi , ziggy , mina , mortis ve edgar oynamayı seviyorum. Hedefim en iyi brawl stars videoları çekmek ve Türkçe brawl stars videoları çekmek. Diğer videoları kaçırmamak için abone olmayı unutmayın. Takipçilerle abonelerle oyunlar oynuyorum bildirimleri açarsanız ona da katılabilirsiniz. İyi seyirler.  #brawlstars #brawlstar #supercell #brawlpass

description:
Tekir - Çözemezler (Official Video)

Söz-Müzik: Tekir
Düzenleme: TKR
Mix&Mastering: Buğra Kunt
Perküsyon: Ozan Kartal
Video: Tekir
Yapım: TKR Music Lab
Dağıtım Şirketi: OneRPM Turkey

Klip Cast: Ozan Kartal, Yener Kapucu, İbrahim Tellaloğlu, Cihan Güz

Şarkı Sözleri:

Gece gündüz derdo derdo
Abe şişti içim, bu ne biçim dert be kardo ?
Ulen bi de tabi sanıyosun; sen boss, ben kof! (siktir!)
Ona rağmen çok düşmanın, az dost, (lalloş!)

Çekemedi bizi buddy birileri deli gibi tabi
E onları hasetleri götürüyo geri geri
Hadi versin allah sana bizden fazlasını gani gani(Chucky !)
Bizim için ne dilesen on bin katı bulsun seni

Kak lan! Leş kokar fanilan da
Zartlağam! Yat aşşağı geri kalkma!
Çoktan yarı yolda attın takla
Yaprağım! Neydim deme,şimdi nolcan?

Çatla! Kuduracan daha çok daha sen
Yolcan saçı başı mafolcan
Abe noksan neremizde? Kıllatma fazla!
Ortağam, çok biliyon maşallah sana! (ih!)

Özenirler hep, ama çözemezler!
Dalakları kabar da çekemezler!
Düşmanlar, a fesatlar!
İçiniz kaynıyo hep hasetten!

Naşlattırırım yakalarsam len seni
Taşlattırırım çekemezlerse beni
Yaşlattırırım gözleri gülemez
Biter ama baştan başlattırırım

Çatlattın gene çatlattın kız
Abe şalvarlı gacim oynarsın mı
Oyna da sen seni kıskansınlar
Götü yanan ortağan hırslansın lan

VIP taliga’m kapımıza yanaşır
Çoramıklar görünce gözleri kamaşır
Hiç hiçine niçin kuduruyon bulaşık?
Kofalaklar gene aç açına dolaşır

Tabi tabi koftiden asaladasın
Tabi çatladı tiyizin koşaladasın
Survivor olsaydı roman adası;
Abe sizin mahalleniz olur gene kosar adası! (kız!)

Özenirler hep, ama çözemezler!
Dalakları kabar da çekemezler!
Düşmanlar, a fesatlar!
İçiniz kaynıyo hep hasetten!

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:
Director: Hur Sungwhe
Art Director: Léa Pinto

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

เนื้อเพลง : คนถูกของ 
  ได้มาเจอนารีหนึ่งนาง 
ดั่งเธอมีเครื่องรางของขลัง 
หัวใจตกในภวังค์หลงใหล
เธอคงมีเวทมนต์คาถา 
ยามพี่บ่าวหลับตาคราใด 
ปรารถนาในหัวใจ มีแต่ใบหน้าของเธอ
  มันทรมานข้างในร่างกาย 
กระวนกระวายเหมือนอีตายพ้น 
หลงมนต์จนเกินจะถอน ไม่เป็นอันกินอันนอนได้
มันไม่อยากจะอยู่แบบนี้ ทำพรือดีมันถึงจะหาย 
มีแต่เธอคนเดียวช่วยได้ ช่วยมาคลายมนต์ดำให้ที
  พี่เหมือนคนถูกของ นะหน้าทองหมอไหน 
จังงังจำแลงแปลงใจ ให้รักใคร่แต่น้องคนเดียว

title: LADIIPRANG - อย่าไปรักใครอีกนะ (No Other One) [Official MV]
tags: loveis|loveis entertainment|LADIIPRANG|อย่าไปรักใครอีกนะ|No Other One|ไม่อยากรักคนอื่นแล้ว|OABNITHI|The Chosen One
description:
Title : อย่าไปรักใครอีกนะ (No Other One)
Artist : LADIIPRANG
Release Date : 12 MAR 2026

ALL STREAMING : https://bfan.link/LADIIPRANG-NoOtherOne
LINE MELODY : https://lin.ee/w5rF5bc

---------------------------------------­-----------­

Executive Director : JEEP
Executive Producer : Danai Thongsinthusak

Produced by Amp Achariya, Chonlatas Chansiri    
Lyrics by Amp Achariya Dulyapaiboon  
Composed by Amp Achariya Dulyapaiboon  
Arranged by Chonlatas Chansiri  
Backing vocals by Amp  
Vocal directed by Amp Achariya 
Digital edited by Chonlatas Chansiri  
Recorded at DBS Studio , Chonlatas Studio, and HummingCat Studio  
Mixed & mastered by Rawee Kangsanarak

LADIIPRANG ส่งต่อความรู้สึกละมุนผ่านเพลงใหม่ “อย่าไปรักใครอีกนะ (No Other One)”
เพลงของคนที่เคยผ่านความผิดหวัง และตอนนี้ได้เจอใครสักคนที่ทำให้เชื่อในรักอีกครั้ง
เพลงนี้ LADIIPRANG ยังคงตั้งใจถ่ายทอดเรื่องราวชีวิตรัก ผ่านเนื้อเพลงที่ทั้งจริงและกินใจ
ที่แสดงให้เห็นถึงการเป็นคนที่เวลารักใคร จะ“ตั้งใจรัก” เสมอ
ความพิเศษของ “อย่าไปรักใครอีกนะ (No Other One)” คือการตั้งใจสร้างลูกเล่นให้เชื่อมโยงกับซิงเกิล
 “ไม่อยากรักคนอื่นแล้ว (The Chosen One)” ของ OABNITHI โดยได้ แอ้ม อัจฉริยา ดุลยไพบูลย์ โปรดิวเซอร์แถวหน้าของวงการเพลงไทย มารังสรรค์ให้เพลงรักสองเพลงนี้เชื่อมถึงกันอย่างกลมกล่อม โดยยังคงเอกลักษณ์และสไตล์ของศิลปินแต่ละคนไว้อย่างชัดเจน
ทั้งสองเพลงเปรียบเสมือนการถ่ายทอดมุมมองของคนสองคน ที่มองมายังความสัมพันธ์เดียวกัน ต่างคนต่างรักในแบบของตัวเอง และมอบความละมุน โรแมนติก อบอุ่นในคนละโทน แต่เข้ากันอย่างลงตัว

---------------------------------------­-----------­

ถ้าเราไม่ได้เจอกัน คงเชื่อว่ารักแท้ไม่มี
ถ้าฉันไม่ได้เจอเธอ คงไม่รู้จักความรักที่ดี
ขอบคุณที่เข้ามาทำให้รู้วันนี้ ว่ารักดีเท่าไหร่

วันที่ยังไม่มีเธอ ต้องกอดตัวเองมาเท่าไร
ในวันที่ต้องเผชิญความเจ็บปวดและความเสียใจ
กว่าจะได้มาเจออ้อมกอดที่อุ่นใจ ของเธอคนนี้

“คัสตาร์ด” ซิงเกิลใหม่จาก แหลม สมพล (LHAM SOMPHOL) ศิลปินในสังกัด ME RECORDS  เพลงที่เกิดขึ้นในช่วงเวลาที่หัวใจกำลังอินเลิฟ และพาเจ้าของเสียงร้องกลับไปสัมผัสความรู้สึกเหมือนวัย 14 อีกครั้ง  สดใหม่ ตื่นเต้น และพร้อมจะรักแบบไม่คิดเผื่อใจ

เล่าเรื่องความรักผ่านการเปรียบเปรยกับ “การนั่งเครื่องบิน” ที่ระหว่างทาง เมนูเสิร์ฟของเที่ยวบินนี้ จะมีรสชาติแตกต่างกันไป เหมือนเส้นทางของความรัก อาจเริ่มต้นด้วยความหอมหวานละมุนแบบ “คัสตาร์ด” สักพักอาจจะตามมาด้วยรสขมของ “ชา” แต่ไม่เป็นไรเมื่อเติมน้ำตาลก็กลับกลมกล่อมพอดี และปิดท้ายด้วย “แตงโม” ใครๆ ก็มองว่าแตงโมต้องหวานฉ่ำ แต่จริงๆ แล้วอาจมีรสฝาดก็เป็นได้

title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
tags: 방탄소년단|BTS|BANGTAN|알엠|RM|슈가|SUGA|제이홉|jhope|지민|정국|k-pop|방탄|j-hope|Jung Kook|Jimin|BTS V|Jin
description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.

title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
tags: minecraft|dream|dream minecraft
description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

description:
ท่ามกลางกระแสธารที่เชี่ยวกรากของโลกธุรกิจ "ความภักดี" ถูกใช้เป็นเครื่องมือชิ้นสุดท้ายในการทำลายคู่แข่ง เมื่อ 'ชลลดา' หญิงสาวผู้รับคำสั่งจากครอบครัว ต้องแทรกซึมเข้าไปในโรงแรมของ 'อาโป' ผู้บริหารสาวนิ่งลึกที่ขึ้นชื่อว่าเดาใจยากที่สุด เพื่อล้วงความลับ อำนาจและความโลภกำลังจะเปลี่ยนโชคชะตาของเธอทั้งคู่ไปตลอดกาล

⏳เมื่อความลับที่ต้องล้วง กลายเป็นเงื่อนไขบีบบังคับหัวใจ 💞 เมื่อความใกล้ชิดถูกใช้เป็นเครื่องมือเข้าหาเป้าหมายที่ดูอันตรายกว่าที่คิด และเมื่อ "แผนลวง" ที่ต้องทำให้แนบเนียน กลับกลายเป็นความรู้สึกที่เกิดขึ้นจริง

ภารกิจที่เริ่มจากผลประโยชน์ แต่ต้องเดิมพันด้วยหัวใจของคนสองคน
เล่ห์กลที่เดิมพันด้วยความแค้น กำลังจะกลายเป็นสายใยรักที่นิรันดร์ 

น้ำนิ่งไหลลึก ยิ่งถลำลึกลงไป ยิ่งอันตรายเกินกว่าจะถอนตัว 🌊

Amidst the raging currents of the corporate world, "loyalty" is used as the ultimate weapon to destroy rivals. When 'Chonlada', acting on strict orders from her family, must infiltrate the hotel of 'Apo' a deeply reserved female executive known for being impossibly hard to read to uncover her secrets, power and greed are about to change both of their destinies forever. 

⏳When the secrets she must steal become the very chains that bind her heart 💞 When intimacy is used as a tool to approach a target far more dangerous than expected And when a flawless "deception" turns into genuine feelings.

A mission born from self-interest must now be gambled with the hearts of two people. A vengeful scheme is about to blossom into an eternal bond of love.
Still waters run deep. 

The deeper she dives, the more impossible it becomes to escape. 🌊

title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025’s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry’s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture.

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.
